channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10332] To install kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64.rpm failed.
item.description:
How do I install the dependent ksym(***) .

[root@centos71611 lustre]# rpm -ivh kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64.rpm
error: Failed dependencies:
ksym(__cv_broadcast) = 0xb75ecbeb is needed by kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64
ksym(arc_add_prune_callback) = 0x23573478 is needed by kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64
ksym(arc_buf_size) = 0x3e5a4fdb is needed by kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64
ksym(arc_remove_prune_callback) = 0x6f8b923b is needed by kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64
ksym(dbuf_create_bonus) = 0x339ac448 is needed by kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64
ksym(dbuf_read) = 0xf89d195b is needed by kmod-lustre-osd-zfs-2.10.1-1.el7.x86_64

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: If the instructions on the wiki - http://wiki.lustre.org/Installing_the_Lustre_Software - are not clear enough then it is better to ask for guidance on the Lustre mailing lists. This project is intended to track engineering tasks relating to the community releases

e2fs
